WISP.data 1.0.0
  • Reference
    • Example of WISP.data functions

Run shiny app for get and visualize WISP data

Source: R/wisp_runApp.R
wisp_runApp.Rd

This function runs the Shiny app for querying and visualizing data from a specific WISP station.

Usage

wisp_runApp(stations = c("WISPstation012", "WISPstation013"), ...)

Arguments

stations

A character vector of station names.

...

Other parameters passed to shiny::runApp.

Author

Alessandro Oggioni, phD alessandro.oggioni@cnr.it

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
WISP.data::wisp_runApp(launch.browser = rstudioapi::viewer)
} # }

On this page
